name: cap-recording
title: Cap
description: Control Cap screen recording via deep links. Start, stop, pause, resume, and switch input devices without leaving your keyboard.
author: cap-community

commands.name: cap-control
commands.title: Cap: Recording Controls

commands.description: Start, stop, pause, resume, or toggle your Cap recording session.

commands.title: Cap: Switch Input Device

commands.description: Switch the active microphone or camera used by Cap.
